description_long: This is a vintage, military-style pickup truck with an open cabin and a mounted machine gun on the rear bed. The body is primarily painted in a weathered tan color with olive green canvas panels on the doors and sides, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The front features a classic vertical grille, two tools mounted on the hood, and simple round headlights. The wheels are spoked and relatively thin, reminiscent of early 20th-century vehicles. The rear cargo area is open and contains the gun mount, with a spare wheel attached to the back. The interior appears basic, with minimal seating and exposed metal surfaces, suitable for utilitarian or combat use.
description: A vintage, tan military-style pickup truck with an open cabin, olive green canvas panels, and a mounted machine gun in the rear cargo bed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical grille, two tools on the hood, and round headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, olive green canvas panels, and the mounted machine gun.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare wheel, open cargo bed, and the back of the gun mount.
description_view_3: Right side view with similar features to the left, including the open cabin and visible steering wheel.
